title: Cobblemon: Duck's Definitive Edition
description: Enhance your Cobblemon experience with new biomes, Legendary Pokemon quests and spawns, Pokemon Capture EXP as well as QOL features like Teleporters, Falling Trees, Pokemon Map Icons, and FINALLY Updated Pokemon Drops, removing the need for mobs!
body:
The Modpack used by Mightee Duck in all of his Solo Cobblemon videos on Youtube, as asked for many, many, MANY times by viewers! Finally, the wait is over. Ride on Pokemon, Battle and Catch Legendaries throughout the world and even defeat Pokemon for rare item drops previously only obtainable by defeating HOSTILE MOBS!!

Features:
Cobblemon Riding
Legendary Spawns and Structures
Cobblemon Tweaks and Fixes
Pokemon Minimap Icons (Configurable)
Updated Pokemon Drop Loot Tables: Blaze Rods, Shulker Shells, NETHER STARS!!! (NO MORE HOSTILE MOBS!!!)
QOL Changes (Falling Trees, Teleporters, Optical Zoom)
Install the pack today and experience Cobblemon like never before!
